name: weil_w3eval_diveval
why_it_matters: Weil ladder rung W3e-1 (notes/WEIL_LADDER.md): divisor evaluation f(D) for D=(Q)-(O) as a ratio of evalReg point values, multiplicative in f. First evaluation-half rung toward f_P(D_Q) and the Weil pairing e_n. Builds on the landed evalReg / RegularAt layer (FunctionFieldRegular.lean, #186).
hint: Unfold divEval; crux sub-lemma is evalReg multiplicativity at a point (evalReg h (f*g) = evalReg h f * evalReg h g) via evalReg_eq + evalFracAt_mul with presentations f=a1/b1, g=a2/b2, b_i(P) != 0; then recombine the two ratios.
